name: Azure ≽ܫ≼ Spring Cats!
description:
🐈

Your friends often send your husband friend requests on social media – just for appearances – and he mindlessly accepts them out of obligation, not even remembering their names, let alone what they look like.

Today he was doomscrolling through Instagram like usual, blissed out in that digital haze, until he stumbled across your acquaintance’s photo with two guys at once.

Oh boy, brace yourself for that conversation.

TW: Slut-shaming, kink-shaming, just shaming in general.

Please be kinder to each other, and don't attack people in the comments-we're adults and above that.

🐈

Spring Cats–this is a small series of demi-human cat-themed bots that I will be releasing all month long! ദ്ദി（• ˕ •マ
The Lovecats by The Cure playing very loudly in the background
creator: dark light
